result.stdout:
PackageScanner - .NET Package Analysis Tool
===========================================

Usage: PackageScanner <command> <solution-directory>

Commands:
  acknowledgements  Generate acknowledgements.txt with package details and licenses
  vulnerability     Check for vulnerable and outdated packages
  license          Check license compliance for commercial projects

Examples:
  PackageScanner acknowledgements C:\MyProject
  PackageScanner vulnerability C:\MyProject
  PackageScanner license C:\MyProject

Configuration:
  Place a 'package-scanner.json' file in your project directory with your license key:
  {
    "IsClosedSource": true,
    "OutputDirectory": ".",
    "License": "your-license-key-here"
  }

Get a license at: https://packagescanner.com/subscribe

commands.payload:
PackageScanner - .NET Package Analysis Tool
===========================================

Usage: PackageScanner <command> <solution-directory>

Commands:
  acknowledgements  Generate acknowledgements.txt with package details and licenses
  vulnerability     Check for vulnerable and outdated packages
  license          Check license compliance for commercial projects

Examples:
  PackageScanner acknowledgements C:\MyProject
  PackageScanner vulnerability C:\MyProject
  PackageScanner license C:\MyProject

Configuration:
  Place a 'package-scanner.json' file in your project directory with your license key:
  {
    "IsClosedSource": true,
    "OutputDirectory": ".",
    "License": "your-license-key-here"
  }

Get a license at: https://packagescanner.com/subscribe

result.stdout:
ERROR: License key is required to use PackageScanner.

Please add your license key to the package-scanner.json file:
{
  "IsClosedSource": true,
  "OutputDirectory": ".",
  "License": "your-license-key-here"
}

You can get a license key by subscribing at: https://packagescanner.com/subscribe
